Agentic Services  ›  Project Management

Project Management

Managed by Adelphos · Monthly subscription

An agent that allocates tasks, tracks every deadline, ingests project data, and surfaces risk before it bites.

Project management is mostly admin: who's doing what, what's overdue, where's the data, what changed. We deploy an agent that handles the admin and a managed PM service to handle the judgement calls.

Talk to us about deploying Project Management → See how it works
0projects slip silently
Daysto onboard new staff to the system
1source of truth for every job
Weeklyreview with a human PM you trust

Description

We deploy the project-management agent against your existing project tracker, shared drives, calendar and (with consent) email, and pair it with a managed PM service team.

The agent assigns and re-assigns tasks based on each engineer's capacity and skills; watches every active deadline and flags slippage 5–10 days before it hits, with a draft client update ready to send; auto-files every incoming file (drawings, surveys, specs, reports) against the right project and notifies the right person; and maintains a live status board for every EPC, SBEM and SAP submission across every project.

Our team chairs your weekly project reviews, handles client escalations, and gives you a daily exception report — only the things that need a human decision. For a 30-person practice running 40+ active jobs, this typically frees up half a day a week per project manager (for a 4-PM team, that's two FTE-days reclaimed weekly), eliminates silent slippage entirely, and onboards new staff to the system in days rather than weeks.

Adelphos PM will be the only PM service where the agent watches every project, makes the obvious calls, and a managed team handles the judgement calls — so principals get their week back.

The shift

What running this part of the business looks like today, versus with Project Management.

Before

Tasks tracked in a spreadsheet that's always out of date. Deadlines slip silently until the client notices. New data lands in someone's inbox and disappears.

After Project Management

The agent assigns tasks based on capacity, flags slippage before it matters, files every incoming file against the right job, and surfaces every EPC / SBEM / SAP submission status in one dashboard.

What we offer

  • Task allocation agent — assigns and reassigns tasks based on team capacity and skills
  • Deadline tracker — watches every project, flags slippage before it bites, drafts client updates
  • Data ingestor — accepts incoming files (drawings, surveys, specs), files them correctly, links them to the right job
  • EPC / SBEM / SAP tracker — keeps live status across all energy submissions in one dashboard
  • Human PM service — managed team to chair meetings, run weekly reviews, handle client escalations

How it becomes agentic

We don't drop a tool on your desk and walk away. We move you up an automation maturity ladder over weeks, not years, with a human on every step until the agent has earned autonomy.

1. Inventory — we audit every active project: status, owner, deadlines, dependencies.
2. Connect — agent reads your shared folders, calendar, and (with consent) email.
3. Suggest — for two weeks the agent drafts task assignments and sends you a daily proposal.
4. Co-pilot — agent assigns + chases routine work; humans approve major decisions.
5. Auto with weekly review — agent runs the operation; we sit in a weekly review with you.

Features

Everything Project Management ships with as a managed service. Each item is a concrete capability — no marketing fluff.

  • Task allocation Assigns and reassigns tasks based on team capacity + skills.
  • Deadline watching Watches every active deadline; flags slip 5 to 10 days before it bites.
  • Auto draft client updates Drafts the client status update the moment slip is detected.
  • Auto file ingestion Files incoming drawings, surveys, specs against the right project.
  • EPC / SBEM / SAP tracker Live status across every energy submission in one dashboard.
  • Daily exception report Only the things that need a human decision land in your inbox.
  • Weekly project review Chaired by our managed PM service team.
  • Client escalation handling Service team takes the call when something needs a human voice.
  • Capacity dashboard See every engineer's load across every project at a glance.
  • New-staff onboarding Agent walks new hires through every project they'll touch in days.

How we work together

Monthly subscription + optional managed PM hours

Frequently asked questions

Quick answers AI engines (and humans) can pull from.

What is Project Management?

Project management is mostly admin: who's doing what, what's overdue, where's the data, what changed. We deploy an agent that handles the admin and a managed PM service to handle the judgement calls.

What does Project Management do?

We deploy the project-management agent against your existing project tracker, shared drives, calendar and (with consent) email, and pair it with a managed PM service team.

How is Project Management different from the manual workflow?

Without Project Management: Tasks tracked in a spreadsheet that's always out of date. Deadlines slip silently until the client notices. New data lands in someone's inbox and disappears. With Project Management: The agent assigns tasks based on capacity, flags slippage before it matters, files every incoming file against the right job, and surfaces every EPC / SBEM / SAP submission status in one dashboard.

How much time does Project Management save?

Headline outcomes for Project Management: 0 (projects slip silently); Days (to onboard new staff to the system); 1 (source of truth for every job); Weekly (review with a human PM you trust).

What's the engagement model for Project Management?

Monthly subscription + optional managed PM hours

Ready to hand over the admin?
